gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/195)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/195)
text: بَعَثَنِي الْمُفَضَّلُ بْنُ عُمَرَ إِلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) بِلَطَفٍ فَدَخَلْتُ عَلَيْهِ فِي يَوْمٍ صَائِفٍ وَ قُدَّامَهُ طَبَقٌ فِيهِ تُفَّاحٌ أَخْضَرُ فَوَ اللَّهِ إِنْ صَبَرْتُ أَنْ قُلْتُ لَهُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ أَ تَأْكُلُ مِنْ هَذَا وَ النَّاسُ يَكْرَهُونَهُ فَقَالَ لِي كَأَنَّهُ لَمْ يَزَلْ يَعْرِفُنِي وُعِكْتُ فِي لَيْلَتِي هَذِهِ فَبَعَثْتُ فَأُتِيتُ بِهِ فَأَكَلْتُهُ وَ هُوَ يَقْلَعُ الْحُمَّى وَ يُسَكِّنُ الْحَرَارَةَ
فَقَدِمْتُ فَأَصَبْتُ أَهْلِي مَحْمُومِينَ فَأَطْعَمْتُهُمْ فَأَقْلَعَتِ الْحُمَّى عَنْهُمْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad Bin Bundar, from his father, from Muhammad Bin Ali Al Hamdany, from Abdullah Bin Sinna, from Dorost Bin Abu Mansour who said,

‘Al-Mufazzal Bin Umar sent me to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> as a courtesy. So I went over to him<sup>asws</sup> on a scorching hot day, and facing him<sup>asws</sup> was a tray in which there were green apples, so by Allah<sup>azwj</sup> I could not be patient and I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! You<sup>asws</sup> are eating from this and the people are abhorring it?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said to me as if he<sup>asws</sup> had not ceased to recognise me: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> woke up in this night of mine<sup>asws</sup>, so I<sup>asws</sup> sent for it and they came with it, So I<sup>asws</sup> ate it and it takes off the fever and settles the temperature’.
So I proceeded (home) and I found my family with fever, so I fed them (apples), and the fever was lifted from them’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Bandar has narrated from his father from Muhammad ibn Ali al-Hamadaniy from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan from Durust ibn abu Mansur who has said the following: “Al-Mufaddal ibn ’Umar once sent me to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, for a favor (from the Imam). I went to him (the Imam) on a summer day and before him there was a tray with green apples in it and I by Allah could hardly wait until I asked saying, ’I pray to Allah to keep my soul in service for your cause, do you eat this while people dislike it?’ He (the Imam) said, as if he still remembered me, ’Last night I had a fever so I sent for it and it was brought for me. I ate it and it cuts down the fever and calms down high temperature.’ I returned and found my family with fever. I fed them (such apples) and fever was cut off from them.”
